{{Infobox
|image_url=https://raw.githubusercontent.com/PixelGuys/Cubyz/refs/tags/0.2.0/assets/cubyz/items/textures/jade.png
|block_health=12
|block_resistance=6
|tool=Pickaxe
|rotation=ore
|ore_range= Above 350
|durability=600
|mass_damage=0.4
|hardness_damage=7
|swing_speed=5
|tags=N/A
|modifiers=durable
}}

== Properties ==
{{Stub|section}}

== Obtaining ==
{{Stub|section}}
Jade can only be found above 350, which results in it only being accessible on tall mountains and sky islands. 

== Usage ==
{{Stub|section}}
When jade is encased in 4 [[Precious]] items, it gains the durable modifier,  increasing the tool's durability by 150%.

4 jade can be crafted into a jade block.

== History ==

* [[0.2.0]] - Added to the game

== Trivia ==
{{Stub|section}}

[[Category:Items]]
[[Category:Materials]]
[[Category:Gems]]
[[Category:Ores]]
